title: Condaliopsis obtusifolia

The classification of Condaliopsis obtusifolia includes its family, Boraginaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants. This family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Condaliopsis obtusifolia belonging to one of these subcategories. The classification of Condaliopsis obtusifolia is primarily based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis.
